name: page_size
label: Page size
hint: Number of results shown on each page.

name: candidate_limit
label: Candidate limit
hint: Maximum number of readable KB records to score in memory.

name: include_body_search
label: Include body search
hint: Include article body text as a low-weight fallback search tier.

name: article_page_id
label: Article page ID
hint: Portal page ID used to open a KB article from the results list.

name: catalog_item_page_id
label: Catalog item page ID
hint: Portal page ID used to open a catalog item or record producer from the results list.
